calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-06-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Petitioner: Antonia Barahona Gomez, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for and with the Minor: Mariela Alejandra Sequeira Barahona, and with Spanish Interpreter: Anna Maria Hodgson.
Interpreter and Petitioner were sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent and Petitioner's testimony differs form information provided on the petition, the request of Decree Changing Name of a Minor is DENIED without prejudice.
